name: Agora Project
short_description: Agora Project is a very short experimental project (~15 minutes). First learning project. Not a full game... It's about a girl who was supposed to go to a party with her friends, but it ends in a tragically. I wish you like it.
detailed_description:
WISHLIST NOW


About the Game

Agora Project is a small learning project where you unveil a short story about a girl going to a party.

ATENTION

This is my FIRST commercial project and is not perfect.

I listed the game for the lowest price possible on Steam now that many people made me realize 5 dollar was indeed too much for a short game from a person new to game development. I'm aware of the game's issues and would have liked to fix them, but I don't have access to the files anymore because I sold the PC I made it on and bought a new one.

By purchasing this game, you're supporting and encouraging my progress. I won't stop making games no matter what. I promise I'll make better and better games until I create very good games, with the right price tag.

Thanks for the support. Sincerely, Luis Gutty, the creator.
